goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking' and 'postcode'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'attraction' by '08:45'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
Make sure you get area and entrance fee
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should have a star of 4 and should include free wifi
Make sure you get whether they have free parking and postcode
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the attraction by 08:45
Make sure you get contact number and car type
